lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (documented in LEARNINGS.md), 0 errors, 0 new warnings in changed files

notes: Implemented ToolDetailPanel (name, status dropdown, category, vendor, url, cost_per_month, description via dynamic TipTap) and ToolSectionDetailPanel (name, description via dynamic TipTap). Both panels use 500ms debounced field updates, Radix Dialog delete confirmation with DialogPrimitive.Title (BUG-023 pattern), and onUpdate/onDelete/onClose callbacks. tools-canvas-view.tsx wired: selectedTool/selectedSection derived from existing selection state, four handlers (handleToolUpdate, handleToolDelete, handleToolSectionUpdate, handleToolSectionDelete) update source-of-truth arrays and the existing useEffect rebuilds React Flow nodes. Panels are mutually exclusive with the summary sidebar via the existing nothingSelected condition. Fixed IMP-079: empty state secondary button label changed from 'Add Group' to 'Add Tool Section'.
